title: tpm — generate_a_weekly_exec_review_pptx_for_the_26ai_pr — v1
description: Synthesized by skill_builder for persona=tpm, kb=generate_a_weekly_exec_review_pptx_for_the_26ai_pr. Refine before promoting.

project_name.description: Program/project name being reported on, typically '26ai

overall_rag.description: Overall project RAG (red/amber/green) reflecting combined schedule, scope and resource health

executive_summary.description: 3-5 sentence narrative for execs covering what shipped this week, what slipped, and the single biggest signal they need to know

key_accomplishments.description: List of concrete deliverables completed this week, each phrased as an outcome with owner (e.g. 'GPU capacity provisioned in PHX — Infra')

upcoming_milestones.description: Next 2-4 weeks of milestones, each formatted 'YYYY-MM-DD — milestone — owner

schedule_health.description: RAG status for the schedule dimension with a 1-2 sentence justification referencing committed milestone dates

scope_health.description: RAG status for scope with 1-2 sentence justification noting any in-flight scope changes or descopes

resource_health.description: RAG status for staffing/resources with 1-2 sentence justification noting hiring gaps, contractor ramp, or attrition

top_risks.description: Top 3-5 program risks, each formatted 'risk — impact — mitigation — owner

metrics_snapshot.description: Key program KPIs vs targets (e.g. burn-up %, story-point velocity, defect counts open/closed, environment readiness %, capacity %), one metric per line as 'metric: value (target X, delta Y)

workstream_status.description: Per-workstream RAG roll-up (e.g. Modeling, Data, Eval, Infra, Safety, GTM), each formatted 'workstream — RAG — one-line note
